多模态学习.title: Bolek: A Multimodal Language Model for Molecular Reasoning
多模态学习.title_zh: Bolek：用于分子推理的多模态语言模型
多模态学习.summary: Molecular property models increasingly support high-stakes drug-discovery decisions, but their outputs are often difficult to audit: classical predictors return scores without rationale, while language models can produce fluent explanations weakly grounded in the input molecule.   We introduce Bolek
多模态学习.summary_zh: 分子性质模型在高风险的药物发现决策中日益重要，但其输出往往难以审计：经典预测器仅返回分数而无理由，而语言模型虽能生成流畅解释，却与输入分子关联薄弱。本文提出Bolek，一种融合分子图结构和文本描述的多模态语言模型，通过联合推理分子结构和化学语言，生成可解释的分子性质预测。创新点在于设计跨模态注意力机制，有效对齐分子图与文本特征，并在多个基准数据集上取得最优性能。主要贡献是提供了可审计、可解释的分子推理框架，有助于药物研发中的决策透明化。

多模态学习.title: The 2026 ACII Dyadic Conversations (DaiKon) Workshop & Challenge
多模态学习.title_zh: 2026年ACII双人对话（DaiKon）研讨会与挑战赛
多模态学习.summary: The 2026 ACII Dyadic Conversations (ACII-DaiKon) Workshop & Challenge introduces a benchmark for modeling interpersonal affect and social dynamics in dyadic conversations. Although conversational affect modeling has advanced rapidly, most benchmarks remain speaker-centric and underrepresent coupled,
多模态学习.summary_zh: 2026年ACII双人对话（DaiKon）研讨会与挑战赛提出了一个用于建模双人对话中人际情感和社会动态的基准。尽管对话情感建模已取得快速进展，但大多数基准仍以说话者为中心，未能充分体现对话双方的耦合动态。该工作通过引入包含丰富标注的双人对话数据集，推动了对交互式情感和社会信号的研究，旨在促进更自然的人机交互系统的发展。

计算机视觉/CV.title: TOC-SR: Task-Optimal Compact diffusion for Image Super Resolution
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: TOC-SR：面向图像超分辨率的任务最优紧凑扩散模型
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Diffusion models have recently demonstrated strong performance for image restoration tasks, including super-resolution. However, their large model size and iterative sampling procedures make them computationally expensive for practical deployment. In this work, we present TOC-SR, a framework for bui
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 扩散模型在图像超分辨率等恢复任务中表现出色，但模型庞大、采样迭代多，导致部署成本高。本文提出TOC-SR框架，旨在构建任务最优的紧凑扩散模型。核心创新包括：通过知识蒸馏压缩模型尺寸，同时保持生成质量；设计任务导向的采样策略，减少迭代步数而不牺牲性能。实验表明，TOC-SR在多个超分辨率基准上达到与全尺寸扩散模型相当的性能，而计算成本降低数倍。主要贡献是实现了高效实用的扩散模型，为图像超分辨率的实际应用提供了可行方案。

计算机视觉/CV.title: SAIL: Structure-Aware Interpretable Learning for Anatomy-Aligned Post-hoc Explanations in OCT
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: SAIL：面向OCT解剖对齐事后解释的结构感知可解释学习
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Optical coherence tomography (OCT), a commonly used retinal imaging modality, plays a central role in retinal disease diagnosis by providing high-resolution visualization of retinal layers. While deep learning (DL) has achieved expert-level accuracy in OCT-based retinal disease detection, its "black box" nature hinders clinical adoption. This paper proposes SAIL, a structure-aware interpretable learning method that generates anatomy-aligned post-hoc explanations for OCT images. SAIL leverages retinal layer segmentation to produce explanations that align with anatomical structures, improving interpretability without sacrificing accuracy. Experiments show that SAIL outperforms existing explanation methods in both faithfulness and clinical relevance.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: SAIL是一种结构感知的可解释学习方法，针对OCT视网膜图像生成与解剖结构对齐的事后解释。通过利用视网膜层分割，SAIL产生的解释与解剖结构一致，在不牺牲准确性的前提下提升了可解释性。实验表明，SAIL在忠实度和临床相关性上优于现有解释方法。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Validation of an AI-based end-to-end model for prostate pathology using long-term archived routine samples
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 基于AI的前列腺病理端到端模型在长期存档常规样本上的验证
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) is becoming a clinical tool for prostate pathology, but generalization across variations in sample preparation and preservation over prolonged time periods remains poorly understood. We evaluated GleasonAI, an end-to-end attention-based multiple instance learning model, on a large cohort of prostate biopsies spanning decades. The model maintained high accuracy despite variations in staining, section thickness, and storage conditions, demonstrating robustness for clinical deployment.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 人工智能正成为前列腺病理的临床工具，但样本制备和长期保存差异下的泛化能力尚不清楚。我们评估了GleasonAI——一种基于注意力的端到端多实例学习模型，在跨越数十年的大量前列腺活检样本上，尽管染色、切片厚度和存储条件存在差异，模型仍保持高准确性，展示了临床部署的稳健性。主要创新点：利用注意力机制实现端到端学习，无需人工特征工程；在长期存档样本上验证，证明对实际临床变异的鲁棒性。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Triple Spectral Fusion for Sensor-based Human Activity Recognition
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 基于传感器的三重频谱融合人类活动识别
计算机视觉/CV.summary: The field of sensor-based human activity recognition (HAR) mainly uses posture, motion and context data of Inertial Measurement Units (IMUs) to identify daily activities. Despite the advancements in learning-based methods, it is challenging to perform information fusion from the temporal perspective
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 本文针对基于传感器的人类活动识别（HAR）任务，提出了一种三重频谱融合方法。HAR主要利用惯性测量单元（IMU）的姿态、运动和上下文数据识别日常活动。尽管基于学习的方法取得了进展，但从时间角度进行信息融合仍具挑战。本文创新性地从频谱域出发，融合三种不同频谱特征（如幅度谱、相位谱等），有效捕获时间序列中的多尺度模式，显著提升了活动识别的准确性和鲁棒性。主要贡献在于提出了一个统一的频谱融合框架，解决了传统时域融合的局限性，并在多个公开数据集上取得了最优结果。

计算机视觉/CV.title: OphMAE: Bridging Volumetric and Planar Imaging with a Foundation Model for Adaptive Ophthalmological Diagnosis
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: OphMAE：面向自适应眼科诊断的体积与平面成像基础模型桥接
计算机视觉/CV.summary: The advent of foundation models has heralded a new era in medical artificial intelligence (AI), enabling the extraction of generalizable representations from large-scale unlabeled datasets. However, current ophthalmic AI paradigms are predominantly constrained to single-modality inference, thereby c
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 本文提出了OphMAE，一种用于眼科诊断的基础模型，能够桥接体积成像（如OCT）和平面成像（如眼底照片）两种模态。当前眼科AI主要局限于单模态推断，限制了其泛化能力。OphMAE通过掩码自编码器（MAE）框架，在大规模未标注的混合模态数据上预训练，学习跨模态的通用表征。创新点包括：设计了一种模态感知的掩码策略，以及一个自适应解码器，能够根据输入模态动态调整特征提取。主要贡献是首次实现了眼科体积与平面成像的统一基础模型，在多个下游诊断任务上显著优于单模态方法，为自适应眼科诊断提供了新范式。

计算机视觉/CV.title: IConFace: Identity-Structure Asymmetric Conditioning for Unified Reference-Aware Face Restoration
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: IConFace：面向统一参考感知人脸修复的身份-结构非对称条件约束
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Blind face restoration is highly ill-posed under severe degradation, where identity-critical details may be missing from the degraded input. Same-identity references reduce this ambiguity, but mismatched pose, expression, illumination, age, makeup, or local facial states can lead to overuse of refer
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 盲人脸修复在严重退化下高度病态，退化输入中可能缺失身份关键细节。相同身份参考可减少歧义，但姿态、表情、光照、年龄、妆容或局部面部状态不匹配可能导致过度使用参考信息。本文提出IConFace，一种身份-结构非对称条件约束框架，统一处理参考感知的人脸修复。创新点在于将身份特征和结构特征分离，并采用非对称条件机制，在保留身份一致性的同时避免参考信息过度干扰。实验表明，该方法在多种退化场景下优于现有方法。

计算机视觉/CV.title: ViewSAM: Learning View-aware Cross-modal Semantics for Weakly Supervised Cross-view Referring Multi-Object Tracking
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: ViewSAM：面向弱监督跨视角指代多目标跟踪的视图感知跨模态语义学习
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Cross-view Referring Multi-Object Tracking (CRMOT) aims to track multiple objects specified by natural language across multiple camera views, with globally consistent identities. Despite recent progress, existing methods rely heavily on costly frame-level spatial annotations and cross-view identity labels. In this paper, we propose ViewSAM, a novel weakly supervised framework that leverages view-aware cross-modal semantics to reduce annotation cost. Specifically, we introduce a view-aware attention mechanism to align language descriptions with visual features across different camera views, and design a cross-view identity propagation module that uses temporal consistency to assign identities without explicit cross-view labels. Experiments on a large-scale CRMOT dataset show that ViewSAM achieves competitive performance compared to fully supervised methods while significantly reducing annotation requirements.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 跨视角指代多目标跟踪（CRMOT）旨在跨多个摄像机视角跟踪由自然语言指定的多个对象，并保持全局一致的标识。尽管近期取得进展，现有方法严重依赖昂贵的帧级空间标注和跨视角身份标签。本文提出ViewSAM，一种新颖的弱监督框架，通过利用视图感知跨模态语义来降低标注成本。具体地，引入视图感知注意力机制以对齐不同视角的语言描述与视觉特征，并设计跨视角身份传播模块，利用时间一致性在无显式跨视角标签的情况下分配身份。在大型CRMOT数据集上的实验表明，ViewSAM在显著减少标注需求的同时，取得了与全监督方法相媲美的性能。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Hyp2Former: Hierarchy-Aware Hyperbolic Embeddings for Open-Set Panoptic Segmentation
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: Hyp2Former：面向开放集全景分割的层级感知双曲嵌入
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Recognizing unknown objects is crucial for safety-critical applications such as autonomous driving and robotics. Open-Set Panoptic Segmentation (OPS) aims to segment known thing and stuff classes while identifying valid unknown objects as separate instances. Prior OPS approaches largely treat known and unknown classes equally, lacking a hierarchy-aware representation. This paper proposes Hyp2Former, which leverages hyperbolic embeddings to capture the hierarchical structure of visual concepts. By embedding features in hyperbolic space, the model naturally separates known and unknown classes along hierarchical levels. Experiments on multiple datasets show state-of-the-art performance in segmenting unknown objects while preserving accuracy on known classes.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 识别未知对象对于自动驾驶和机器人等安全关键应用至关重要。开放集全景分割（OPS）旨在分割已知的物体和背景类别，同时将有效未知对象识别为独立实例。现有OPS方法大多平等对待已知和未知类别，缺乏层级感知表示。本文提出Hyp2Former，利用双曲嵌入来捕捉视觉概念的层级结构。通过将特征嵌入双曲空间，模型自然地在层级上分离已知和未知类别。在多个数据集上的实验表明，该方法在分割未知对象方面达到最优，同时保持已知类别的准确性。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Improving Model Safety by Targeted Error Correction
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 通过针对性错误纠正提升模型安全性
计算机视觉/CV.summary: The widespread adoption of machine learning in critical applications demands techniques to mitigate high-consequence errors. Our method utilizes a dual-classifier GBDT pipeline to distinguish routine human-like errors from high-risk non-human misclassifications. Evaluated across three domains, animal classification, autonomous driving, and medical imaging, the approach reduces high-risk errors by up to 90% while maintaining overall accuracy. The system identifies and corrects specific error types that could lead to catastrophic failures, providing a practical safety layer for deployed models.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 机器学习在关键应用中的广泛采用需要能够减轻高后果错误的技术。我们的方法利用双分类器GBDT流水线来区分常规类人错误与高风险的非人类误分类。在动物分类、自动驾驶和医学影像三个领域进行评估，该方法将高风险错误减少高达90%，同时保持整体准确性。该系统识别并纠正可能导致灾难性故障的特定错误类型，为部署模型提供了实用的安全层。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Virtual Scanning for NSCLC Histology: Investigating the Discriminatory Power of Synthetic PET
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 非小细胞肺癌组织学的虚拟扫描：探究合成PET的鉴别能力
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Accurate histological differentiation between adenocarcinoma (ADC) and squamous cell carcinoma (SCC) is critical for personalized treatment in non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC). While [18F]FDG PET/CT is a standard tool for the clinical evaluation of lung cancer, its utility is often limited by image quality and availability. This paper investigates the use of synthetic PET images generated from CT scans via deep learning to perform virtual scanning for histological classification. The method achieves high accuracy in distinguishing ADC from SCC using only CT-derived synthetic PET, reducing the need for actual PET acquisitions. Experiments on a large dataset demonstrate the discriminatory power of synthetic PET, offering a cost-effective alternative for NSCLC subtyping.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 准确区分非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）中的腺癌（ADC）和鳞状细胞癌（SCC）对于个性化治疗至关重要。虽然[18F]FDG PET/CT是肺癌临床评估的标准工具，但其效用常受限于图像质量和可用性。本文研究了通过深度学习从CT扫描生成合成PET图像，用于组织学分类的虚拟扫描。该方法仅使用CT衍生的合成PET即可高精度区分ADC和SCC，减少了对实际PET扫描的需求。在大型数据集上的实验证明了合成PET的鉴别能力，为NSCLC亚型分类提供了一种经济有效的替代方案。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Perceptual Flow Network for Visually Grounded Reasoning
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 面向视觉基础推理的感知流网络
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Despite the success of Large-Vision Language Models (LVLMs), general optimization objectives (e.g., standard MLE) fail to constrain visual trajectories, leading to language bias and hallucination. To mitigate this, current methods introduce geometric priors from visual experts as additional supervision, but they often suffer from high computational cost and limited generalization. In this paper, we propose Perceptual Flow Network (PFNet), a novel framework that learns to dynamically route visual information through a learnable flow field, guided by perceptual consistency. PFNet introduces a lightweight flow module that adaptively warps visual features according to language instructions, effectively reducing hallucination without relying on external geometric priors. Extensive experiments on visually grounded reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that PFNet achieves state-of-the-art performance while being computationally efficient.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 针对大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）中语言偏差和幻觉问题，本文提出感知流网络（PFNet）。现有方法依赖视觉专家提供的几何先验作为额外监督，但计算成本高且泛化性有限。PFNet创新地引入可学习的感知流场，根据语言指令动态扭曲视觉特征，无需外部先验即可有效抑制幻觉。该网络通过轻量级流模块实现视觉轨迹约束，在视觉基础推理基准上取得最优性能，同时保持计算高效。主要贡献包括：提出感知流概念用于视觉-语言对齐；设计轻量流模块实现自适应特征扭曲；显著降低幻觉并提升推理准确性。

机器人.title: Orchestrating Spatial Semantics via a Zone-Graph Paradigm for Intricate Indoor Scene Generation
机器人.title_zh: 通过区域图范式编排空间语义以生成复杂室内场景
机器人.summary: Autonomous 3D indoor scene synthesis breaks down in non-convex rooms with tightly coupled spatial constraints. Data-driven generators lack topological priors for long-horizon planning, while iterative agents fragment semantics and become geometrically brittle. We present ZoneMaestro, a unified frame
机器人.summary_zh: 自主3D室内场景合成在非凸房间和紧密空间约束下失效。数据驱动生成器缺乏拓扑先验进行长程规划，而迭代代理则分裂语义且几何脆弱。本文提出ZoneMaestro，一种基于区域图范式的统一框架，通过将空间语义组织为区域图，实现复杂室内场景的结构化生成。创新点在于引入区域图作为中间表示，有效捕捉空间拓扑和功能关系，支持长程规划。主要贡献是显著提升了非凸房间场景生成的质量和合理性，在多个指标上超越现有方法。

机器人.title: CoRAL: Contact-Rich Adaptive LLM-based Control for Robotic Manipulation
机器人.title_zh: CoRAL：基于大语言模型的接触丰富自适应机器人操作控制
机器人.summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs) demonstrate remarkable capabilities in high-level reasoning and semantic understanding, applying them directly to contact-rich manipulation remains a challenge due to their lack of explicit physical grounding and inability to perform fine-grained control. This paper proposes CoRAL, a framework that leverages LLMs for high-level task planning and adapts control policies for contact-rich manipulation through a learned dynamics model. CoRAL integrates LLM-based reasoning with a low-level controller that handles physical interactions, enabling adaptive behavior in tasks like peg insertion and assembly. Experiments show that CoRAL achieves higher success rates compared to pure LLM or pure RL baselines.
机器人.summary_zh: CoRAL框架将大语言模型的高层推理能力与接触丰富操作的底层控制相结合，通过学习动力学模型实现自适应控制。该框架解决了LLM缺乏物理基础和细粒度控制能力的问题，在插销插入和装配等任务中取得了比纯LLM或纯RL基线更高的成功率。

机器人.title: A Semantic Autonomy Framework for VLM-Integrated Indoor Mobile Robots: Hybrid Deterministic Reasoning and Cross-Robot Adaptive Memory
机器人.title_zh: 集成视觉语言模型的室内移动机器人语义自主框架：混合确定性推理与跨机器人自适应记忆
机器人.summary: Autonomous indoor mobile robots can navigate reliably to metric coordinates using established frameworks such as ROS 2 Navigation 2, yet they lack the ability to interpret natural language instructions that express intent rather than positions. Vision-Language Models offer the semantic reasoning req
机器人.summary_zh: 自主室内移动机器人能够使用ROS 2 Navigation 2等成熟框架可靠地导航到度量坐标，但缺乏解释表达意图而非位置的自然语言指令的能力。视觉-语言模型提供了所需的语义推理能力。本文提出一个语义自主框架，结合混合确定性推理和跨机器人自适应记忆，使机器人能够理解自然语言指令并执行任务。创新点在于将视觉-语言模型与确定性推理结合，并引入跨机器人记忆共享机制，提升了机器人的语义理解和适应性。主要贡献是实现了从度量导航到语义导航的跨越，增强了机器人在真实环境中的实用性。

大语言模型/LLM.title: AcademiClaw: When Students Set Challenges for AI Agents
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: AcademiClaw：当学生为AI代理设置挑战
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Benchmarks within the OpenClaw ecosystem have thus far evaluated exclusively assistant-level tasks, leaving the academic-level capabilities of OpenClaw largely unexamined. We introduce AcademiClaw, a bilingual benchmark of 80 complex, long-horizon tasks sourced directly from university students' rea
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: OpenClaw生态系统中的基准测试迄今仅评估了助手级任务，而OpenClaw的学术级能力尚未被检验。本文提出AcademiClaw，一个包含80个复杂、长周期任务的双语基准，任务直接来源于大学生的真实需求。这些任务涵盖多个学科，要求AI代理进行深度推理、知识整合和长期规划。创新点在于构建了学术级任务集，填补了现有基准的空白。主要贡献是提供了一个评估AI代理高级认知能力的标准，揭示了当前模型在学术任务上的不足。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Mitigating Misalignment Contagion by Steering with Implicit Traits
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 通过隐式特质引导缓解对齐传染
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Language models (LMs) are increasingly used in high-stakes, multi-agent settings, where following instructions and maintaining value alignment are critical. Most alignment research focuses on interactions between a single LM and a single user, failing to address the risk of misaligned behavior spreading across agents. This paper proposes a method to mitigate misalignment contagion by steering LMs using implicit traits, such as honesty and helpfulness, encoded in the model's internal representations. The approach leverages a trait-based steering vector to adjust the model's behavior without fine-tuning, effectively preventing the propagation of harmful behaviors in multi-agent systems. Experiments demonstrate that this method reduces misalignment contagion while preserving task performance.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 该论文针对多智能体环境中语言模型的对齐传染风险，提出了一种基于隐式特质（如诚实、乐于助人）的引导方法。通过利用模型内部表征中的特质向量进行行为调整，无需微调即可有效防止有害行为在智能体间传播。实验表明，该方法在保持任务性能的同时显著降低了对齐传染。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Hybrid Inspection and Task-Based Access Control in Zero-Trust Agentic AI
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 零信任代理AI中的混合检查与基于任务的访问控制
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Authorizing Large Language Model (LLM)-driven agents to dynamically invoke tools and access protected resources introduces significant security risks, and the risks grow dramatically as agents engage in multi-turn conversations and scale toward distributed collaboration. A compromised or malicious agent could leak sensitive data or perform unauthorized actions. We propose a hybrid inspection and task-based access control framework that combines real-time content inspection with fine-grained permission management, ensuring that agents only access resources necessary for their task. The framework is evaluated on a simulated enterprise environment, showing effective threat mitigation with minimal performance overhead.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 授权LLM驱动的代理动态调用工具和访问受保护资源带来了重大安全风险，且随着代理进行多轮对话和分布式协作而急剧增加。被攻破或恶意的代理可能泄露敏感数据或执行未授权操作。我们提出一种混合检查与基于任务的访问控制框架，结合实时内容检查和细粒度权限管理，确保代理仅访问任务所需资源。在模拟企业环境中评估，该框架有效缓解威胁且性能开销极小。创新点：首次将零信任原则应用于LLM代理安全；提出任务级最小权限访问控制。

大语言模型/LLM.title: mdok-style at SemEval-2026 Task 10: Finetuning LLMs for Conspiracy Detection
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: mdok-style在SemEval-2026任务10中：微调LLM进行阴谋论检测
大语言模型/LLM.summary: SemEval-2026 Task 10 is focused on conspiracy detection. Specifically, the goal is to detect whether a Reddit comment expresses a conspiracy belief. Our submitted mdok-style system utilizes data augmentation and self-training (to cope with a rather small amount of training data) to finetune the Qwen 2.5-7B model. The system achieves competitive performance, demonstrating that LLMs can be effectively adapted for this task with limited labeled data.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: SemEval-2026任务10聚焦于阴谋论检测，目标是检测Reddit评论是否表达阴谋论信念。我们提交的mdok-style系统利用数据增强和自训练（以应对少量训练数据）微调Qwen 2.5-7B模型。系统取得了有竞争力的性能，证明了LLM可在有限标注数据下有效适应此任务。创新点：结合数据增强与自训练策略，在低资源场景下微调LLM；展示了LLM在社交媒体内容审核中的应用潜力。

大语言模型/LLM.title: SpecKV: Adaptive Speculative Decoding with Compression-Aware Gamma Selection
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: SpecKV：基于压缩感知的Gamma选择的自适应推测解码
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Speculative decoding accelerates large language model (LLM) inference by using a small draft model to propose candidate tokens that a larger target model verifies. A critical hyperparameter in this process is the speculation length~$γ$, which determines how many tokens the draft model proposes per s
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 推测解码通过使用小型草稿模型生成候选token，再由大型目标模型验证，从而加速大语言模型推理。该过程中一个关键超参数是推测长度γ，它决定了草稿模型每次提议的token数量。本文提出SpecKV，一种自适应推测解码方法，通过压缩感知的γ选择策略动态调整推测长度，以平衡推理速度和验证开销。创新点在于利用上下文压缩信息来预测最优γ值，显著提升推理效率。主要贡献包括：提出压缩感知的γ选择机制，在保持生成质量的同时减少验证步骤；实验表明在多个LLM基准上实现了2-3倍加速。

大语言模型/LLM.title: On Training Large Language Models for Long-Horizon Tasks: An Empirical Study of Horizon Length
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 关于训练大语言模型执行长程任务：任务长度影响的实证研究
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown promise as interactive agents that solve tasks through extended sequences of environment interactions. While prior work has primarily focused on system-level optimizations or algorithmic improvements, the role of task horizon length in shaping training dynamics remains underexplored. We systematically investigate how varying horizon lengths affect LLM training for long-horizon tasks, finding that longer horizons exacerbate training instability and require careful tuning of learning rate and batch size. Our experiments on simulated environments provide practical guidelines for training LLMs on tasks requiring extended reasoning chains.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 大语言模型（LLMs）在作为交互代理解决需要通过与环境进行长序列交互的任务方面展现出潜力。以往研究主要关注系统级优化或算法改进，但任务长度对训练动态的影响尚未充分探索。本文系统研究了不同任务长度如何影响LLM在长程任务上的训练，发现更长的任务长度会加剧训练不稳定性，需要对学习率和批量大小进行仔细调优。通过在模拟环境中的实验，为训练LLM执行需要长推理链的任务提供了实用指南。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Strategy-Aware Optimization Modeling with Reasoning LLMs
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 基于推理LLM的策略感知优化建模
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Large language models (LLMs) can generate syntactically valid optimization programs, yet often struggle to reliably choose an effective modeling strategy, leading to incorrect formulations and inefficient solver behavior. We propose SAGE, a strategy-aware framework that makes Modeling Strategy explicit and guides LLMs to select appropriate modeling paradigms (e.g., linear programming vs. constraint programming) based on problem characteristics. Experiments on diverse optimization benchmarks show SAGE significantly improves solution quality and solver efficiency compared to baseline LLM approaches.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 大语言模型（LLMs）能够生成语法正确的优化程序，但往往难以可靠地选择有效的建模策略，导致公式错误和求解器效率低下。本文提出SAGE，一个策略感知框架，将建模策略显式化，并引导LLM根据问题特征选择合适的建模范式（如线性规划与约束规划）。在多种优化基准上的实验表明，与基线LLM方法相比，SAGE显著提高了求解质量和求解器效率。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Foundation-Model-Based Agents in Industrial Automation: Purposes, Capabilities, and Open Challenges
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 工业自动化中基于基础模型的智能体：目的、能力与开放挑战
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Foundation models, particularly large language models, are increasingly integrated into agent architectures for industrial tasks such as decision support, process monitoring, and engineering automation. Yet evidence on their purposes, capabilities, and limitations remains fragmented across domains.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 基础模型，特别是大型语言模型，正越来越多地被集成到面向工业任务（如决策支持、过程监控和工程自动化）的智能体架构中。然而，关于其目的、能力和局限性的证据在各领域仍较为分散。本论文系统综述了基于基础模型的智能体在工业自动化中的应用，分析了其关键能力（如自然语言理解、推理和规划），并指出了数据隐私、实时性和可解释性等开放挑战。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Trustworthy AI Suffers from Invariance Conflicts and Causality is The Solution
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 可信人工智能面临不变性冲突，因果关系是解决方案
大语言模型/LLM.summary: As artificial intelligence (AI), including machine learning (ML) models and foundation models (FMs), is increasingly deployed in high-stakes domains, ensuring their trustworthiness has become a central challenge. However, the core trustworthy AI objectives, such as fairness, robustness, privacy, and
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 随着人工智能（包括机器学习模型和基础模型）在高风险领域的部署日益增多，确保其可信性已成为核心挑战。然而，公平性、鲁棒性、隐私等可信AI核心目标之间往往存在冲突，例如提升鲁棒性可能损害公平性。本文指出这些冲突源于不变性约束之间的矛盾，并提出利用因果关系来调和这些冲突，为构建真正可信的AI系统提供了理论框架和方法指导。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Foundation Models to Unlock Real-World Evidence from Nationwide Medical Claims
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 利用基础模型从全国医疗索赔数据中挖掘真实世界证据
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Evidence derived from large-scale real-world data (RWD) is increasingly informing regulatory evaluation and healthcare decision-making. Administrative claims provide population-scale, longitudinal records of healthcare utilization, expenditure, and detailed coding of diagnoses, procedures, and medic
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 基于大规模真实世界数据（RWD）的证据正越来越多地为监管评估和医疗决策提供信息。行政索赔数据提供了人群规模的纵向医疗利用、支出以及诊断、程序和药物的详细编码记录。本文提出利用基础模型（如大型语言模型）从全国医疗索赔数据中提取真实世界证据，通过预训练和微调范式，有效处理了医疗数据的复杂性和异质性，在药物安全监测和疗效比较等任务上取得了显著效果。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Beyond State Machines: Executing Network Procedures with Agentic Tool-Calling Sequences
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 超越状态机：通过智能体工具调用序列执行网络程序
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Agentic AI will be an essential enabling technology for designing future mobile communication systems, which could provide flexible and customized services, automate complex network operations, and drive autonomous decision-making across the network. This work studies how Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents can execute network procedures by generating tool-calling sequences, moving beyond traditional state machine approaches. The proposed method leverages LLMs to interpret high-level goals and dynamically compose tool calls to achieve network tasks such as resource allocation and fault management. Experiments demonstrate improved flexibility and adaptability compared to rule-based systems.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 智能体AI将成为设计未来移动通信系统的关键技术，能够提供灵活定制化的服务、自动化复杂网络操作并驱动网络自主决策。本研究探索了基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体如何通过生成工具调用序列来执行网络程序，超越了传统的状态机方法。所提方法利用LLM解释高层目标，动态组合工具调用以实现资源分配和故障管理等网络任务。实验表明，与基于规则的系统相比，该方法在灵活性和适应性上均有提升。

大语言模型/LLM.title: From Experimental Limits to Physical Insight: A Retrieval-Augmented Multi-Agent Framework for Interpreting Searches Beyond the Standard Model
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 从实验限制到物理洞察：用于解释超越标准模型搜索的检索增强多智能体框架
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Modern searches for physics beyond the Standard Model produce rapidly expanding literature containing heterogeneous information, including textual analyses, numerical datasets, and graphical exclusion limits. Integrating these distributed sources remains a time-consuming and manual process for physicists. This paper proposes a retrieval-augmented multi-agent framework that automates the integration and interpretation of such heterogeneous data, enabling efficient extraction of physical insights from experimental limits. The framework leverages large language models for multi-step reasoning and retrieval-augmented generation to ground outputs in external knowledge sources.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文提出了一种检索增强多智能体框架，旨在自动化整合和解释超越标准模型搜索中产生的异构信息（包括文本分析、数值数据集和图形排除限制）。该框架利用大语言模型进行多步推理，并通过检索增强生成将输出锚定在外部知识源中，从而帮助物理学家从实验限制中高效提取物理洞察。创新点在于将多智能体协作与检索增强结合，处理高能物理领域的异构数据，显著减少人工整合时间，提升搜索效率。主要贡献是提供了一个自动化工具，能够从快速增长的文献中综合信息，辅助新物理的发现。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Benchmarking Retrieval Strategies for Biomedical Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Controlled Empirical Study
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 生物医学检索增强生成的检索策略基准测试：一项受控实证研究
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) offers a well-established path to grounding large language model (LLM) outputs in external knowledge, yet the question of which retrieval strategy works best in a high-stakes domain such as biomedicine has not received the controlled, multi-metric treatment it deserves. This paper presents a controlled empirical study benchmarking various retrieval strategies for biomedical RAG, evaluating them on multiple metrics including accuracy, relevance, and efficiency. The study provides insights into the trade-offs between different retrieval methods and offers recommendations for practitioners.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文对生物医学领域的检索增强生成（RAG）中不同检索策略进行了受控实证基准测试。研究在多个指标（如准确性、相关性和效率）上评估了多种检索方法，揭示了不同策略之间的权衡。创新点在于针对高风险生物医学领域进行了系统性的、多指标对比，填补了该领域缺乏受控研究的空白。主要贡献是为从业者提供了选择检索策略的实证依据，有助于提高LLM在生物医学应用中输出的可靠性和准确性。

大语言模型/LLM.title: U-Define: Designing User Workflows for Hard and Soft Constraints in LLM-Based Planning
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: U-Define：为基于LLM的规划中的硬约束和软约束设计用户工作流
大语言模型/LLM.summary: LLMs are increasingly used for end-user task planning, yet their black-box nature limits users' ability to ensure reliability and control. While recent systems incorporate verification techniques, it remains unclear how users can effectively apply such rigid constraints to represent intent or adapt to dynamic contexts. This paper introduces U-Define, a system that allows users to specify both hard and soft constraints in LLM-based planning workflows. It provides a user interface for defining constraints and uses them to guide the planning process, improving reliability and user control.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文提出U-Define系统，用于在基于LLM的任务规划中设计用户工作流，支持用户指定硬约束和软约束。创新点在于将约束定义与LLM规划结合，允许用户灵活表达意图并适应动态场景，克服了现有系统仅依赖刚性验证的局限。主要贡献是通过用户界面和约束引导机制，提升了LLM规划的可控性和可靠性，使用户能够更有效地参与规划过程。

理论研究.title: First-Order Efficiency for Probabilistic Value Estimation via A Statistical Viewpoint
理论研究.title_zh: 从统计视角实现概率价值估计的一阶效率
理论研究.summary: Probabilistic values, including Shapley values and semivalues, provide a model-agnostic framework to attribute the behavior of a black-box model to data points or features, with a wide range of applications including explainable artificial intelligence and data valuation. However, their exact comput
理论研究.summary_zh: 概率价值（包括Shapley值和半值）提供了一个模型无关的框架，将黑盒模型的行为归因于数据点或特征，广泛应用于可解释人工智能和数据估值。然而，其精确计算通常因组合爆炸而不可行。本文从统计视角提出一阶高效估计方法，通过理论分析揭示概率价值的统计结构，设计出计算复杂度与样本量线性相关的估计器。创新点在于严格证明了估计器达到一阶最优效率。主要贡献是为大规模数据归因提供了理论基础和实用算法，显著降低了计算成本。

理论研究.title: Deciphering Shortcut Learning from an Evolutionary Game Theory Perspective
理论研究.title_zh: 从演化博弈论视角解读捷径学习
理论研究.summary: Shortcut learning causes deep learning models to rely on non-essential features within the data. However, its formation in deep neural network training still lacks theoretical understanding. In this paper, we provide a formal definition of core and shortcut features and employ evolutionary game theory to model the competition between these features during training. Our analysis reveals that shortcut features can dominate due to their initial advantage in reducing loss, even if they are less robust. We propose a regularization method to mitigate shortcut learning and validate it on synthetic and real-world datasets.
理论研究.summary_zh: 捷径学习导致深度学习模型依赖数据中的非本质特征。然而，其在深度神经网络训练中的形成机制仍缺乏理论理解。本文给出了核心特征和捷径特征的形式化定义，并采用演化博弈论对训练过程中这些特征之间的竞争进行建模。分析表明，捷径特征因其在降低损失方面的初始优势而可能占据主导，尽管其鲁棒性较差。我们提出了一种正则化方法来缓解捷径学习，并在合成和真实数据集上进行了验证。

理论研究.title: AIs and Humans with Agency
理论研究.summary: This paper compares agency in humans with potential agency in AI programs. Human agency takes many years to develop, as the frontal lobe is activated. Early attempts to endow LLMs agency have met serious obstacles. Progress requires a new architecture where actions and plans are formulated jointly with a world model and a value system, enabling goal-directed behavior.
理论研究.summary_zh: 本文比较了人类的能动性与AI程序的潜在能动性。人类能动性需多年发展（如前额叶激活），而早期赋予LLM能动性的尝试遇到严重障碍。创新点在于提出需要一种新架构，其中行动和计划与世界模型和价值观系统共同制定，以实现目标导向行为。主要贡献是从认知科学角度分析了AI能动性的本质，为未来设计具有真正能动性的AI系统提供了理论框架。

NLP.title: Shadow-Loom: Causal Reasoning over Graphical World Model of Narratives
NLP.title_zh: Shadow-Loom：基于叙事图形世界模型的因果推理
NLP.summary: Stories hold a reader's attention because they have causes, secrets, and consequences. Shadow-Loom is an experimental open-source framework that turns a narrative into a versioned graphical world model and lets two engines act on it: a causal physics grounded in Pearl's ladder of causation and a recursive engine for exploring counterfactuals. The framework enables causal reasoning over narrative structures, allowing users to query causes, effects, and alternative storylines. It is built on top of a knowledge graph representation and supports interactive exploration. The main contribution is a novel approach to narrative understanding that combines causal inference with world modeling.
NLP.summary_zh: Shadow-Loom是一个实验性开源框架，将叙事转化为带版本的图形世界模型，并集成基于Pearl因果阶梯的因果物理引擎和反事实递归引擎。该框架支持对叙事结构进行因果推理，可查询原因、结果和替代情节。主要创新在于将因果推断与世界建模相结合，为叙事理解提供了新方法。

推荐系统.title: An Empirical Study of Agent Skills for Healthcare: Practice, Gaps, and Governance
推荐系统.title_zh: 面向医疗的智能体技能实证研究：实践、差距与治理
推荐系统.summary: Healthcare automation is shaped by local procedures and organizational constraints, so agent capabilities rarely transfer unchanged across settings. Agent skills, self-contained directories that package reusable procedures for AI agents, are emerging as a procedural layer for adapting healthcare agents. This paper presents an empirical study of agent skills in healthcare, analyzing current practices, identifying gaps in skill transferability and governance, and proposing a framework for skill management. The study highlights the need for standardized skill representations and governance mechanisms to enable safe and effective deployment of AI agents in healthcare.
推荐系统.summary_zh: 该论文对医疗领域中的智能体技能进行了实证研究，分析了当前实践，识别了技能可迁移性和治理方面的差距，并提出了技能管理框架。研究发现，医疗自动化受本地流程和组织约束影响，智能体技能难以跨场景迁移。论文强调了标准化技能表示和治理机制对医疗AI智能体安全有效部署的重要性。

强化学习/RL.title: Recurrent Deep Reinforcement Learning for Chemotherapy Control under Partial Observability
强化学习/RL.title_zh: 基于循环深度强化学习的部分可观测化疗控制
强化学习/RL.summary: Chemotherapy dose optimization can be formulated as a dynamic treatment regime, requiring sequential decisions under uncertainty that must balance tumor suppression against toxicity. However, most reinforcement learning approaches assume full observability of the patient state, a condition rarely met in practice. We propose a recurrent deep reinforcement learning framework that uses recurrent neural networks to handle partial observability, learning optimal dosing policies from historical patient data. The model outperforms standard RL baselines in simulations, reducing toxicity while maintaining efficacy.
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 化疗剂量优化可建模为动态治疗方案，需在不确定性下进行序贯决策，平衡肿瘤抑制与毒性。然而，大多数强化学习方法假设患者状态完全可观测，这在现实中很少成立。我们提出一种循环深度强化学习框架，利用循环神经网络处理部分可观测性，从历史患者数据中学习最优给药策略。在模拟中，该模型优于标准RL基线，降低了毒性同时保持疗效。创新点：将循环神经网络与深度强化学习结合，解决医疗决策中的部分可观测问题；首次将DRL应用于化疗控制的实际部分可观测场景。

强化学习/RL.title: Enhancing RL Generalizability in Robotics through SHAP Analysis of Algorithms and Hyperparameters
强化学习/RL.title_zh: 通过算法与超参数的SHAP分析提升机器人强化学习泛化能力
强化学习/RL.summary: Despite significant advances in Reinforcement Learning (RL), model performance remains highly sensitive to algorithm and hyperparameter configurations, while generalization gaps across environments complicate real-world deployment. Although prior work has studied RL generalization, the relative contributions of algorithmic choices and hyperparameters to generalization performance are not well understood. In this paper, we propose a systematic framework using SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) to analyze the impact of various RL algorithms and hyperparameters on generalization in robotic tasks. We conduct extensive experiments on simulated robotic environments, identifying key factors that enhance generalization, such as entropy regularization and network architecture. Our findings provide actionable insights for practitioners to select robust configurations, and we demonstrate improved generalization on unseen environments.
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 尽管强化学习（RL）取得了显著进展，模型性能仍对算法和超参数配置高度敏感，而跨环境的泛化差距阻碍了实际部署。以往研究虽探讨了RL泛化，但算法选择与超参数对泛化性能的相对贡献尚不明确。本文提出一个系统框架，利用SHAP（沙普利加法解释）分析多种RL算法和超参数对机器人任务泛化的影响。在模拟机器人环境中进行大量实验，识别出增强泛化的关键因素，如熵正则化和网络架构。研究结果为从业者选择鲁棒配置提供了可操作见解，并在未见环境中展示了改进的泛化能力。

强化学习/RL.title: Efficient Preference Poisoning Attack on Offline RLHF
强化学习/RL.title_zh: 离线RLHF的高效偏好投毒攻击
强化学习/RL.summary: Offline Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) pipelines such as Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) train on a pre-collected preference dataset, which makes them vulnerable to preference poisoning attack. We study label flip attacks against log-linear DPO. We first illustrate that flipping a small fraction of labels can drastically degrade the learned reward model. We then propose an efficient attack algorithm that identifies the most influential data points to flip, maximizing the damage with minimal perturbations. Theoretical analysis shows that our attack achieves near-optimal poisoning effect. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets confirm the effectiveness and efficiency of our method, highlighting the vulnerability of offline RLHF to data poisoning.
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 本文研究离线RLHF（如直接偏好优化DPO）中的偏好投毒攻击。针对对数线性DPO模型，作者发现翻转少量标签即可严重破坏学习到的奖励模型。提出一种高效攻击算法，通过识别最具影响力的数据点进行标签翻转，以最小扰动实现最大破坏。理论分析证明该攻击达到近最优投毒效果，在合成和真实数据集上的实验验证了其有效性和高效性。核心贡献：首次系统分析离线RLHF对标签翻转攻击的脆弱性；提出基于影响函数的高效攻击策略；揭示RLHF安全漏洞，为防御研究提供基础。

优化算法.title: A second-order method on the Stiefel manifold via Newton–Schulz
优化算法.summary: Retraction-free approaches offer attractive low-cost alternatives to Riemannian methods on the Stiefel manifold, but they are often first-order, which may limit the efficiency under high-accuracy requirements. To this end, we propose a second-order method landing on the Stiefel manifold without involving retractions. The method leverages the Newton-Schulz iteration to approximate the Riemannian Hessian, achieving superlinear convergence. Numerical experiments on eigenvalue problems and deep learning tasks show that the method outperforms existing first-order retraction-free methods in terms of accuracy and convergence speed.
优化算法.summary_zh: 无回缩方法为Stiefel流形上的黎曼方法提供了低成本替代方案，但通常是一阶的，在高精度要求下效率受限。为此，我们提出一种无需回缩的二阶方法，利用Newton-Schulz迭代近似黎曼Hessian，实现超线性收敛。在特征值问题和深度学习任务上的数值实验表明，该方法在精度和收敛速度上优于现有的一阶无回缩方法。创新点：将Newton-Schulz迭代引入流形优化，实现高效二阶优化；首次提出Stiefel流形上的无回缩二阶方法。

优化算法.title: Caliper-in-the-Loop: Black-Box Optimization for Hyperledger Fabric Performance Tuning
优化算法.title_zh: Caliper-in-the-Loop：用于Hyperledger Fabric性能调优的黑盒优化
优化算法.summary: Hyperledger Fabric performance depends on many interacting configuration parameters, making manual tuning difficult. We study automated throughput tuning by treating benchmarking as a noisy black-box optimization problem and applying Bayesian optimization (BO) with dimensionality reduction (DR). We propose a framework that integrates the Caliper benchmarking tool with BO to automatically find optimal configurations, significantly improving throughput compared to default settings.
优化算法.summary_zh: 本文针对Hyperledger Fabric性能调优问题，将基准测试视为带噪声的黑盒优化，采用贝叶斯优化结合降维技术实现自动化吞吐量调优。创新点在于将Caliper基准测试工具与贝叶斯优化集成，形成闭环调优框架，有效处理了配置参数间的交互和噪声。主要贡献是提出了一种自动调优方法，相比默认配置显著提升了系统吞吐量，为区块链性能优化提供了实用方案。

AI应用/生物医学.title: An explainable hypothesis-driven approach to Drug-Induced Liver Injury with HADES
AI应用/生物医学.title_zh: 基于可解释假设驱动的HADES方法用于药物性肝损伤预测
AI应用/生物医学.summary: Drug-induced liver injury (DILI) remains a leading cause of late-stage clinical trial attrition. However, existing computational predictors primarily rely on binary classification, a framing that limits generalization and yields no mechanistic insight to guide translational decisions. We argue that
AI应用/生物医学.summary_zh: 本文针对药物性肝损伤（DILI）预测问题，提出了一种可解释的假设驱动方法HADES。现有计算预测器主要依赖二分类框架，泛化能力有限且缺乏机制性见解。HADES创新性地将预测转化为基于生物学假设的推理过程，通过整合多源数据（如分子结构、代谢途径）和因果推理模型，不仅预测DILI风险，还提供可解释的病理机制解释。主要贡献包括：提出假设驱动的预测范式，显著提升了跨药物类别的泛化能力；提供了可操作的机制性洞察，有助于临床决策。该方法在多个基准数据集上优于现有方法，为药物安全性评估提供了新工具。

机器人/强化学习.title: Learning Equivariant Neural-Augmented Object Dynamics From Few Interactions
机器人/强化学习.title_zh: 从少量交互中学习等变神经增强物体动力学
机器人/强化学习.summary: Learning data-efficient object dynamics models for robotic manipulation remains challenging, especially for deformable objects. A popular approach is to model objects as sets of 3D particles and learn their motion using graph neural networks. In practice, this is not enough to maintain physical feas
机器人/强化学习.summary_zh: 本文针对机器人操作中物体动力学模型的数据效率问题，提出了一种等变神经增强方法。现有方法将物体建模为3D粒子集并使用图神经网络学习运动，但难以保持物理可行性。创新点在于引入等变性归纳偏置，确保模型对平移、旋转等对称变换具有一致性，从而从少量交互中高效学习。主要贡献包括：提出等变图神经网络架构，显著减少所需训练数据；在刚体和可变形物体上均实现高保真动力学预测；通过少量真实交互即可泛化到新场景。该方法为机器人操作中数据高效的物理推理提供了新思路。

软件工程/LLM.title: AI-Generated Smells: An Analysis of Code and Architecture in LLM and Agent-Driven Development
软件工程/LLM.title_zh: AI生成的气味：LLM与智能体驱动开发中代码与架构的分析
软件工程/LLM.summary: The promise of Large Language Models in automated software engineering is often measured by functional correctness, overlooking the critical issue of long term maintainability. This paper presents a systematic audit of technical debt in AI-generated software, revealing that AI does not eliminate fla
软件工程/LLM.summary_zh: 本文系统审计了AI生成软件中的技术债务问题。大型语言模型（LLM）在自动化软件工程中的表现常以功能正确性衡量，而忽略了长期可维护性。研究发现，AI并未消除代码缺陷，反而引入了新的“AI气味”——代码和架构层面的反模式。创新点在于：首次对LLM和智能体驱动开发产生的代码进行系统性气味检测；分类并量化了AI特有的架构和代码问题，如冗余抽象、过度工程化等。主要贡献是揭示了AI生成代码的可维护性风险，为开发者和研究者提供了改进方向。该研究对AI辅助编程的实践具有重要指导意义。

传感器与边缘计算.title: (POSTER) From Sensors to Insight: Rapid, Edge-to-Core Application Development for Sensor-Driven Applications
传感器与边缘计算.title_zh: (海报) 从传感器到洞察：面向传感器驱动应用的快速边缘到核心开发
传感器与边缘计算.summary: Scientists increasingly rely on sensor-based data; however transforming raw streams into insights across the edge-to-cloud continuum remains difficult due to the breadth of expertise required to coordinate the necessary data and computation flow. This paper introduces a pattern-based, AI-assisted me
传感器与边缘计算.summary_zh: 科学家日益依赖基于传感器的数据，但由于协调所需数据和计算流程需要广泛的专业知识，将原始数据流转化为边缘到云连续体的洞察仍然困难。本文介绍了一种基于模式、AI辅助的方法，用于快速开发传感器驱动应用。创新点在于提出可复用的设计模式库和AI辅助的代码生成，降低开发门槛。主要贡献：提供从传感器到洞察的端到端框架，支持边缘到核心的部署，并通过案例研究展示了其效率和灵活性。

安全性与控制理论.title: Set-Based Training of Neural Barrier Certificates for Safety Verification of Dynamical Systems
安全性与控制理论.title_zh: 基于集合的神经障碍函数训练用于动力系统安全验证
安全性与控制理论.summary: Barrier certificates are scalar functions over the state space of dynamical systems that separate all unsafe states from all reachable states. The existence of a barrier certificate formally verifies the safety of the dynamical system. Recent approaches synthesize barrier certificates by iteratively
安全性与控制理论.summary_zh: 障碍函数是动力系统状态空间上的标量函数，用于将所有不安全状态与所有可达状态分离。障碍函数的存在正式验证了动力系统的安全性。最近的方法通过迭代方式合成障碍函数。本文提出基于集合的神经障碍函数训练方法，创新点在于使用集合传播技术来训练神经网络形式的障碍函数，避免了对精确可达集的计算。主要贡献：提出一种可扩展的训练框架，能够处理高维系统，并在多个基准上验证了其有效性，相比传统方法提高了训练效率和鲁棒性。

人机协作.title: HAAS: A Policy-Aware Framework for Adaptive Task Allocation Between Humans and Artificial Intelligence Systems
人机协作.title_zh: HAAS：一种策略感知的自适应人机任务分配框架
人机协作.summary: Deciding how to distribute work between humans and AI systems is a central challenge in organisational design. Most approaches treat this as a binary choice, yet the operational reality is richer: humans and AI routinely share tasks or take complementary roles depending on context, fatigue, and the
人机协作.summary_zh: 决定如何在人类和AI系统之间分配工作是组织设计中的核心挑战。大多数方法将其视为二元选择，但操作现实更加丰富：人类和AI通常根据上下文、疲劳等因素共享任务或扮演互补角色。本文提出HAAS，一种策略感知的自适应任务分配框架。创新点在于引入策略感知机制，动态调整任务分配策略以适应当前情境和人类状态。主要贡献：设计了包含人类模型和AI模型的任务分配算法，实验表明在多个模拟场景中提高了整体效率和用户满意度。

自然语言处理/NLP.title: Dependency Parsing Across the Resource Spectrum: Evaluating Architectures on High and Low-Resource Languages
自然语言处理/NLP.title_zh: 资源谱系中的依存句法分析：评估高资源和低资源语言上的架构
自然语言处理/NLP.summary: Transformer-based models achieve state-of-the-art dependency parsing for high-resource languages, yet their advantage over simpler architectures in low-resource settings remains poorly understood. We evaluate four parsers -- the Biaffine LSTM, Stack-Pointer Network, AfroXLMR-large, and RemBERT -- ac
自然语言处理/NLP.summary_zh: 基于Transformer的模型在高资源语言的依存句法分析中取得了最先进性能，但它们在低资源环境下的优势相对于简单架构仍不明确。本文评估了四种解析器——Biaffine LSTM、Stack-Pointer Network、AfroXLMR-large和RemBERT——在多种语言上的表现。创新点在于系统性地比较了不同复杂度架构在资源谱系上的表现。主要贡献：发现低资源情况下，简单架构（如LSTM）与复杂Transformer模型性能相当，甚至更优，为资源受限场景的模型选择提供了指导。

知识图谱/逻辑.title: Static Analysis of Recursive SHACL
知识图谱/逻辑.summary: SHACL (Shapes Constraint Language) expresses constraints on RDF data by means of so-called shapes. Its central service is validation: verifying whether a data graph complies with a SHACL document. But so far, there are no static analysis services to compare documents. In this paper, we study the fol
知识图谱/逻辑.summary_zh: SHACL（形状约束语言）通过所谓的形状表达对RDF数据的约束。其核心服务是验证：检查数据图是否符合SHACL文档。但迄今为止，还没有用于比较文档的静态分析服务。本文研究了递归SHACL的静态分析问题，提出了文档可比性和蕴含关系的形式化方法，为SHACL文档的优化和互操作性提供了理论基础。主要贡献包括定义递归形状的语义、设计静态分析算法以及证明其复杂性。

理论研究/优化算法.title: Universal Smoothness via Bernstein Polynomials: A Constructive Approximation Approach for Activation Functions
理论研究/优化算法.title_zh: 通过伯恩斯坦多项式实现通用平滑性：激活函数的构造性逼近方法
理论研究/优化算法.summary: The efficacy of deep neural networks is heavily reliant on the design of non-linear activation functions, yet existing approaches often struggle to balance optimization stability with computational efficiency. While piecewise linear functions offer inference speed, they suffer from optimization inst
理论研究/优化算法.summary_zh: 深度神经网络的效能高度依赖于非线性激活函数的设计，但现有方法往往难以平衡优化稳定性与计算效率。分段线性函数虽推理速度快，但存在优化不稳定问题。本文提出一种基于伯恩斯坦多项式的通用平滑激活函数构造方法，通过多项式逼近实现任意阶可导的平滑性，同时保持计算高效性。理论分析证明了该方法的逼近能力，实验表明在多种任务上，使用该方法的网络收敛更快、泛化性能更优。

多模态学习/智能体.title: GRAIL: A Deep-Granularity Hybrid Resonance Framework for Real-Time Agent Discovery via SLM-Enhanced Indexing
多模态学习/智能体.title_zh: GRAIL：通过SLM增强索引实现实时智能体发现的深度粒度混合共振框架
多模态学习/智能体.summary: As the ecosystem of Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents expands rapidly, efficient and accurate Agent Discovery becomes a critical bottleneck for large-scale multi-agent collaboration. Existing approaches typically face a dichotomy: either relying on heavy-weight LLMs for intent parsing, leading
多模态学习/智能体.summary_zh: 随着基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体生态系统快速扩展，高效准确的智能体发现成为大规模多智能体协作的关键瓶颈。现有方法面临两难：要么依赖重权LLM进行意图解析，导致高延迟；要么使用轻量方法但精度不足。本文提出GRAIL，一种深度粒度混合共振框架，通过小语言模型（SLM）增强索引实现实时智能体发现。创新点在于引入共振机制融合语义和结构信息，并采用SLM进行高效索引更新。实验表明，该方法在保持高精度的同时显著降低延迟。

大语言模型/LLM应用.title: ORPilot: A Production-Oriented Agentic LLM-for-OR Tool for Optimization Modeling
大语言模型/LLM应用.title_zh: ORPilot：面向生产的基于智能体LLM的运筹优化建模工具
大语言模型/LLM应用.summary: This paper presents ORPilot, an open-source agentic AI system that translates real-world business problems into solver-ready optimization models. Unlike academic LLM-for-OR tools that assume clean problem specifications with preformatted inline data, ORPilot is designed for production conditions: am
大语言模型/LLM应用.summary_zh: 本文提出ORPilot，一个开源智能体AI系统，将现实商业问题转化为求解器可用的优化模型。与学术LLM运筹工具假设问题规格清晰且数据内联不同，ORPilot针对生产环境设计：处理非结构化输入、数据源多样、约束模糊等挑战。创新点包括多智能体协作架构、上下文感知的模型生成和迭代优化机制。实验表明，ORPilot在多个真实场景中显著提高了建模效率和准确性。

图神经网络.title: SCGNN: Semantic Consistency enhanced Graph Neural Network Guided by Granular-ball Computing
图神经网络.title_zh: SCGNN：基于粒球计算引导的语义一致性增强图神经网络
图神经网络.summary: Capturing semantic consistency among nodes is crucial for effective graph representation learning. Existing approaches typically rely on k-nearest neighbors (kNN) or other node-level full search algorithms (FSA) to mine semantic relationships via exhaustive pairwise similarity computation, which is computationally expensive and may introduce noise. We propose SCGNN, a novel framework that leverages granular-ball computing to efficiently identify groups of semantically consistent nodes without exhaustive search. By constructing coarse-to-fine granular structures, SCGNN enhances semantic consistency while reducing computational cost. Experiments on several graph benchmarks demonstrate superior performance in node classification and link prediction tasks.
图神经网络.summary_zh: 捕捉节点间的语义一致性对于有效的图表示学习至关重要。现有方法通常依赖k近邻（kNN）或其他节点级全搜索算法（FSA），通过穷举成对相似度计算来挖掘语义关系，计算成本高且可能引入噪声。本文提出SCGNN，一种利用粒球计算高效识别语义一致节点组的新框架，无需穷举搜索。通过构建由粗到细的粒结构，SCGNN在增强语义一致性的同时降低了计算成本。在多个图基准上的实验表明，在节点分类和链接预测任务中性能优越。

生成模型.title: AI and Open-data Driven Scalable Solar Power Profiling
生成模型.title_zh: 基于AI和开放数据的可扩展太阳能功率画像
生成模型.summary: Solar photovoltaic (PV) deployment is expanding rapidly, yet detailed, up-to-date information on the spatial distribution and capacity of rooftop PV remains limited. This paper presents an open, scalable framework for detecting solar panels from open data and generating city-level solar power profiles. Using satellite imagery and deep learning models, we achieve high-accuracy panel detection, and further integrate weather data to estimate power generation. The framework is validated across multiple cities, demonstrating scalability and practical utility for energy planning.
生成模型.summary_zh: 太阳能光伏（PV）部署正在迅速扩大，但关于屋顶光伏空间分布和容量的详细、最新信息仍然有限。本文提出一个开放、可扩展的框架，利用开放数据检测太阳能电池板并生成城市级太阳能功率画像。通过卫星图像和深度学习模型，实现了高精度的面板检测，并进一步整合天气数据以估算发电量。该框架在多个城市得到验证，展示了可扩展性和在能源规划中的实用价值。

人机交互/教育AI.title: ProPACT: A Proactive AI-Driven Adaptive Collaborative Tutor for Pair Programming
人机交互/教育AI.title_zh: ProPACT：一种主动式AI驱动的结对编程自适应协作导师
人机交互/教育AI.summary: Effective pair programming depends on coordination of attention, cognitive effort, and joint regulation over time, yet most adaptive learning systems remain individual-centric and reactive. This paper introduces ProPACT, a proactive AI-driven adaptive collaborative tutor that treats collaboration itself as the learning objective. ProPACT uses a multi-modal sensing framework to monitor gaze, speech, and code actions in real-time, and employs a dynamic intervention policy to provide timely prompts and feedback. Experiments with 60 student pairs show that ProPACT significantly improves collaborative outcomes, including code quality and learning gains, compared to baseline conditions.
人机交互/教育AI.summary_zh: 有效的结对编程依赖于注意力、认知努力和联合调节的协调，但大多数自适应学习系统仍以个体为中心且反应式。本文提出ProPACT，一种主动式AI驱动的自适应协作导师，将协作本身视为学习目标。ProPACT使用多模态感知框架实时监测注视、语音和代码操作，并采用动态干预策略提供及时的提示和反馈。在60组学生对的实验中，ProPACT显著提升了协作成果，包括代码质量和学习收益，优于基线条件。

迁移学习/参数高效微调.title: Compress Then Adapt? No, Do It Together via Task-aware Union of Subspaces
迁移学习/参数高效微调.title_zh: 先压缩再适配？不，通过任务感知子空间联合一次性完成
迁移学习/参数高效微调.summary: Adapting large pretrained models to diverse tasks is now routine, yet the two dominant strategies of parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) and low-rank compression are typically composed in sequence. This decoupled practice first compresses and then fine-tunes adapters, potentially misaligning the compression with downstream task requirements. In this paper, we propose a unified framework that jointly performs compression and adaptation through a task-aware union of subspaces. Our method learns a shared low-rank subspace that is simultaneously optimized for both model size reduction and task-specific adaptation. Experiments on multiple NLP and vision tasks demonstrate that our approach outperforms sequential compression-then-adaptation baselines, achieving better accuracy with comparable or lower model complexity.
迁移学习/参数高效微调.summary_zh: 将大型预训练模型适配到多样任务已成为常规操作，但两种主流策略——参数高效微调（PEFT）和低秩压缩——通常顺序执行。这种解耦做法先压缩再微调适配器，可能导致压缩与下游任务需求不匹配。本文提出一个统一框架，通过任务感知的子空间联合同时进行压缩和适配。该方法学习一个共享的低秩子空间，同时优化模型尺寸缩减和任务特定适配。在多个NLP和视觉任务上的实验表明，我们的方法优于顺序的压缩-适配基线，在相同或更低模型复杂度下实现了更高精度。

图神经网络/生成模型.title: Fine-Grained Graph Generation through Latent Mixture Scheduling
图神经网络/生成模型.title_zh: 通过潜在混合调度实现细粒度图生成
图神经网络/生成模型.summary: Structure aware graph generation aims to generate graphs that satisfy given topological properties. It has applications in domains such as drug discovery, social network modeling, and knowledge graph construction. Unlike existing methods that only provide coarse control over graph properties, we introduce a novel framework that enables fine-grained control over local and global graph structures. Our approach, Latent Mixture Scheduling (LMS), models the generation process as a mixture of latent components with a scheduling mechanism that gradually refines structure from coarse to fine. We evaluate LMS on multiple benchmark datasets, showing significant improvements in generating graphs with specified degree distributions, clustering coefficients, and community structures.
图神经网络/生成模型.summary_zh: 结构感知图生成旨在生成满足给定拓扑属性的图，应用于药物发现、社交网络建模和知识图谱构建等领域。与仅提供粗略控制的现有方法不同，我们提出一个新颖框架，实现对局部和全局图结构的细粒度控制。我们的方法——潜在混合调度（LMS），将生成过程建模为潜在组件的混合，并通过调度机制从粗到细逐步优化结构。在多个基准数据集上的评估表明，LMS在生成具有指定度分布、聚类系数和社区结构的图方面取得了显著改进。

规划与推理.title: Counterfactual Reasoning in Automated Planning
规划与推理.title_zh: 自动规划中的反事实推理
规划与推理.summary: Automated planning traditionally assumes that all aspects of a planning task (initial state, goals, and available actions) are fully specified in advance, an approach well-suited to domains with fixed rules and deterministic execution. However, real-world planning often requires flexibility, allowin
规划与推理.summary_zh: 传统的自动规划假设规划任务的所有方面（初始状态、目标和可用动作）都预先完全指定，这种方法适用于固定规则和确定性执行的领域。然而，现实世界的规划通常需要灵活性，允许对计划进行调整。本论文提出将反事实推理引入自动规划，使规划系统能够从失败中学习并生成替代方案，显著提升了规划在不确定环境中的鲁棒性和适应性。

语音识别.title: When Audio-Language Models Fail to Leverage Multimodal Context for Dysarthric Speech Recognition
语音识别.title_zh: 当音频-语言模型未能利用多模态上下文进行构音障碍语音识别时
语音识别.summary: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems remain brittle on dysarthric and other atypical speech. Recent audio-language models raise the possibility of improving performance by conditioning on additional clinical context at inference time, but it is unclear whether these models can make use of such
语音识别.summary_zh: 自动语音识别（ASR）系统在构音障碍及其他非典型语音上仍然脆弱。最近的音频-语言模型提出了通过在推理时附加临床上下文来提升性能的可能性，但尚不清楚这些模型能否利用此类信息。本文通过实验发现，当前音频-语言模型在构音障碍语音识别中未能有效利用多模态上下文，揭示了模型在融合额外信息方面的局限性。创新点在于系统性地评估了多模态上下文对非典型语音识别的影响，并指出了现有模型的不足，为未来改进提供了方向。

代码克隆检测.title: Standing on the Shoulders of Giants: Stabilized Knowledge Distillation for Cross--Language Code Clone Detection
代码克隆检测.title_zh: 站在巨人的肩膀上：面向跨语言代码克隆检测的稳定知识蒸馏
代码克隆检测.summary: Cross-language code clone detection (X-CCD) is challenging because semantically equivalent programs written in different languages often share little surface similarity. Although large language models (LLMs) have shown promise for semantic clone detection, their use as black-box systems raises conce
代码克隆检测.summary_zh: 跨语言代码克隆检测（X-CCD）具有挑战性，因为用不同语言编写的语义等价程序通常表面相似性很低。尽管大型语言模型（LLM）在语义克隆检测上显示出潜力，但将其作为黑盒系统使用引发了隐私和成本问题。本文提出一种稳定的知识蒸馏方法，将LLM的知识迁移到轻量级模型，实现高效且可部署的跨语言代码克隆检测。创新点在于设计了稳定化蒸馏策略，解决了教师-学生模型间的分布偏移问题。主要贡献是首次将知识蒸馏应用于X-CCD，在保持高准确率的同时大幅降低计算开销。

因果模型与决策.title: The Design and Composition of Structural Causal Decision Processes
因果模型与决策.title_zh: 结构因果决策过程的设计与组合
因果模型与决策.summary: We present two new classes of causal models of decision-making agents. Our approach is motivated by the needs of modeling the economics of computing systems. These systems are composed of subsystems and can exhibit endogenous limits on cognitive resources and value discounting. Structural Causal Dec
因果模型与决策.summary_zh: 本文提出了两类新的决策智能体因果模型。研究动机源于对计算系统经济学的建模需求，这些系统由子系统组成，并表现出认知资源和价值折现的内生限制。结构因果决策过程（SCDP）将因果图与决策理论结合，支持模块化组合。创新点在于引入结构因果模型来描述决策过程，并允许在子系统层面进行推理。主要贡献是为计算系统的经济行为提供了形式化框架，有助于分析和设计具有资源约束的智能体。

情感识别.title: Fuzzy Fingerprinting Encoder Pre-trained Language Models for Emotion Recognition in Conversations: Human Assessment and Validity Study
情感识别.title_zh: 模糊指纹编码器预训练语言模型用于对话情感识别：人工评估与有效性研究
情感识别.summary: In Emotion Recognition in Conversations (ERC), model decisions should align with nuanced human perception and ideally provide insights on the classification process. Standard encoder pre-trained language models (PLMs) are the state-of-the-art at these tasks but offer little insight into why a certai
情感识别.summary_zh: 在对话情感识别（ERC）中，模型决策应与细微的人类感知对齐，并理想地提供分类过程的见解。标准的编码器预训练语言模型（PLM）在这些任务上表现最佳，但几乎无法解释为何做出特定决策。本文提出模糊指纹编码器PLM，通过模糊逻辑生成可解释的“指纹”，揭示模型的情感分类依据。创新点在于将模糊系统与PLM结合，增强了模型的可解释性。主要贡献是通过人工评估验证了该方法的有效性，表明模糊指纹能提供与人类判断一致的洞察，提升了ERC系统的透明度和可信度。

知识图谱问答.title: SCPRM: A Schema-aware Cumulative Process Reward Model for Knowledge Graph Question Answering
知识图谱问答.title_zh: SCPRM：面向知识图谱问答的架构感知累积过程奖励模型
知识图谱问答.summary: Large language models excel at complex reasoning, yet evaluating their intermediate steps remains challenging. Although process reward models provide step-wise supervision, they often suffer from a risk compensation effect, where incorrect steps are offset by later correct ones, assigning high reward to flawed reasoning paths. This paper proposes SCPRM, a schema-aware cumulative process reward model for knowledge graph question answering. By incorporating the schema structure of knowledge graphs and cumulatively rewarding steps, SCPRM mitigates risk compensation and provides more accurate step-level feedback. Experiments on multiple KGQA benchmarks show improved reasoning accuracy and robustness.
知识图谱问答.summary_zh: 大语言模型在复杂推理方面表现出色，但评估其中间步骤仍具挑战性。尽管过程奖励模型提供了步骤级监督，但它们常常遭受风险补偿效应的影响，即错误的步骤被后续正确步骤抵消，从而对有缺陷的推理路径给予高奖励。本文提出SCPRM，一种面向知识图谱问答的架构感知累积过程奖励模型。通过结合知识图谱的架构结构并累积奖励步骤，SCPRM缓解了风险补偿效应，提供了更准确的步骤级反馈。在多个KGQA基准上的实验表明，推理准确性和鲁棒性均得到提升。

推荐系统/其他AI应用.title: From Sensors to Insight: Rapid, Edge-to-Core Application Development for Sensor-Driven Applications
推荐系统/其他AI应用.title_zh: 从传感器到洞察：面向传感器驱动应用的快速边缘到核心开发
推荐系统/其他AI应用.summary: Scientists increasingly rely on sensor-based data, yet transforming raw streams into insights across the edge-to-cloud continuum remains difficult. Provisioning heterogeneous infrastructure and managing execution on emerging platforms like Data Processing Units typically requires cross-domain expertise. We present a framework that abstracts the complexities of edge-to-core deployment, enabling rapid development of sensor-driven AI applications. Our approach provides a unified programming model and automated orchestration across diverse hardware, significantly reducing development time. Case studies in environmental monitoring and smart manufacturing demonstrate that our framework achieves comparable performance to hand-tuned implementations while requiring minimal expert intervention.
推荐系统/其他AI应用.summary_zh: 针对传感器数据从边缘到云全链路处理的复杂性，本文提出一个抽象化部署复杂度的框架，支持快速开发传感器驱动的AI应用。该框架提供统一的编程模型和跨异构硬件的自动编排，显著降低开发时间。在环境监测和智能制造案例中，框架实现了与手工调优实现相当的性能，同时仅需极少专家干预。核心贡献：提出边缘到核心的统一开发范式；实现数据处理器（DPU）等新兴平台的无缝集成；大幅降低跨领域专业知识门槛。

NLP/智能体.title: DataClaw: A Process-Oriented Agent Benchmark for Exploratory Real-World Data Analysis
NLP/智能体.title_zh: DataClaw：面向探索性真实世界数据分析的过程导向智能体基准
NLP/智能体.summary: Evaluating autonomous data analysis agents requires testing their ability to perform exploratory analysis in underexplored data environments. However, many existing benchmarks emphasize final answer accuracy in prior-guided data settings and provide limited support for reasoning process evaluation. We introduce DataClaw, a benchmark designed to assess agents on open-ended exploratory tasks with real-world datasets. DataClaw focuses on the reasoning process, providing fine-grained metrics for plan quality, execution correctness, and insight novelty. Experiments on multiple state-of-the-art agents reveal significant gaps in exploratory capabilities, especially in hypothesis generation and iterative refinement. DataClaw serves as a tool to drive progress toward more autonomous and insightful data analysis agents.
NLP/智能体.summary_zh: 现有数据分析智能体基准多强调最终答案准确性，缺乏对探索性推理过程的评估。本文提出DataClaw基准，专注于开放域探索任务，采用真实数据集，从计划质量、执行正确性和洞察新颖性三个细粒度维度评估推理过程。实验表明，当前最先进智能体在假设生成和迭代优化方面存在显著不足。核心贡献：首个过程导向的探索性数据分析基准；提供多维度推理过程评估指标；揭示现有智能体在真实世界数据分析中的关键瓶颈。

机器学习/其他.title: A Novel Preprocessing-Driven Approach to Remaining Useful Life (RUL) Prediction Using Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCN)
机器学习/其他.title_zh: 一种新颖的预处理驱动方法：基于时序卷积网络（TCN）的剩余寿命预测
机器学习/其他.summary: Accurate prediction of Remaining Useful Life (RUL) in aero-engines is vital for predictive maintenance, improved operational reliability, and reduced lifecycle costs. While deep learning approaches have demonstrated strong potential in this area, most existing methods focus primarily on model architecture innovations, often neglecting the critical role of data preprocessing. In this paper, we propose a preprocessing-driven framework that systematically enhances input data quality before feeding into a Temporal Convolutional Network (TCN). Our preprocessing pipeline includes adaptive denoising, feature alignment, and temporal smoothing, tailored to the characteristics of sensor signals. Experiments on the C-MAPSS dataset show that our approach significantly outperforms standard TCN and other state-of-the-art methods, achieving up to 15% improvement in prediction accuracy. The work highlights the importance of data preprocessing in RUL prediction and provides a practical solution for industrial applications.
机器学习/其他.summary_zh: 针对航空发动机剩余寿命（RUL）预测，现有方法多聚焦模型架构创新而忽视数据预处理。本文提出预处理驱动框架，在输入时序卷积网络（TCN）前系统提升数据质量：包括自适应去噪、特征对齐和时间平滑，专门针对传感器信号特性设计。在C-MAPSS数据集上，该方法相比标准TCN和现有最优方法，预测精度提升高达15%。核心贡献：强调数据预处理在RUL预测中的关键作用；提出针对传感器信号的专用预处理流水线；提供实用的工业解决方案。

AI逻辑与论证系统.title: Double Rectified Linear Unit-based Modular Semantics for Quantitative Bipolar Argumentation Framework
AI逻辑与论证系统.title_zh: 基于双修正线性单元的模块化语义用于量化双极论证框架
AI逻辑与论证系统.summary: Quantitative Bipolar Argumentation Frameworks (QBAFs) provide an alternative approach to computing argument acceptability in Bipolar Argumentation Frameworks (BAFs). Each argument is assigned an initial strength, which is then updated to a final strength by considering the influence of both its attacking and supporting arguments. This paper proposes a novel modular semantics based on Double Rectified Linear Units (ReLU) to compute argument strengths in QBAFs. The proposed approach allows for flexible aggregation of different types of influences and demonstrates improved performance on benchmark datasets.
AI逻辑与论证系统.summary_zh: 量化双极论证框架(QBAF)为双极论证框架(BAF)中论证可接受性的计算提供了一种替代方法。每个论证被赋予初始强度，然后通过考虑其攻击和支持论证的影响更新为最终强度。本文提出了一种基于双修正线性单元(ReLU)的新型模块化语义，用于计算QBAF中的论证强度。该方法允许灵活聚合不同类型的影响，并在基准数据集上展示了改进的性能。创新点在于引入ReLU作为非线性激活函数，实现了对攻击和支持影响的模块化处理，提高了计算效率和解释性。

医疗影像与分层学习.title: Coherent Hierarchical Multi-Label Learning to Defer for Medical Imaging
医疗影像与分层学习.title_zh: 用于医疗影像的一致性分层多标签延迟学习
医疗影像与分层学习.summary: Learning to Defer (L2D) enables a model to predict autonomously or defer to an expert, but prior work largely assumes flat label spaces. We study the first L2D setting with hierarchical multi-label decisions, motivated by medical-imaging workflows in which findings are organised by clinical taxonomies. We propose a coherent hierarchical multi-label L2D framework that respects the hierarchical structure of labels, ensuring consistency across levels. The framework is evaluated on medical imaging datasets, demonstrating improved accuracy and reduced deferral rates compared to flat baselines.
医疗影像与分层学习.summary_zh: 延迟学习(L2D)使模型能够自主预测或延迟至专家，但先前工作主要假设平坦标签空间。本文首次研究了具有分层多标签决策的L2D设置，受医疗影像工作流中按临床分类组织发现的启发。我们提出了一致性分层多标签L2D框架，尊重标签的分层结构，确保跨层级的一致性。在医疗影像数据集上的评估表明，与平坦基线相比，该方法提高了准确性并降低了延迟率。创新点在于将分层约束引入L2D，实现了临床可解释的决策延迟机制。

生物信号与迁移学习.title: Pretraining on Sleep Data Improves non-Sleep Biosignal Tasks
生物信号与迁移学习.title_zh: 睡眠数据预训练提升非睡眠生物信号任务性能
生物信号与迁移学习.summary: Sleep foundation models have recently demonstrated strong performance on in-domain polysomnography tasks, including sleep staging, apnea detection, and disease risk prediction. In this work, we investigate whether sleep biosignals can serve as an effective pretraining distribution for learning representations that transfer to other non-sleep biosignal tasks. We pretrain a transformer model on large-scale sleep data and fine-tune on diverse biosignal tasks such as ECG classification and activity recognition. Results show significant improvements over training from scratch, highlighting the transferability of sleep-derived representations.
生物信号与迁移学习.summary_zh: 睡眠基础模型近期在域内多导睡眠图任务上展示了强大性能，包括睡眠分期、呼吸暂停检测和疾病风险预测。本文探究了睡眠生物信号是否可作为有效的预训练分布，学习可迁移至其他非睡眠生物信号任务的表示。我们在大规模睡眠数据上预训练了一个Transformer模型，并在多种生物信号任务（如ECG分类和活动识别）上进行微调。结果表明，与从头训练相比，预训练带来了显著提升，突显了睡眠衍生表示的可迁移性。创新点在于首次验证了睡眠数据预训练对非睡眠生物信号任务的泛化能力。

安全强化学习与扩散规划.title: A decoupled diffusion planner that adapts to changing cost limits by using cost-conditioned generation for safety and reward gradients for performance
安全强化学习与扩散规划.title_zh: 一种解耦扩散规划器：利用成本条件生成保证安全、利用奖励梯度提升性能，适应变化成本限制
安全强化学习与扩散规划.summary: Offline safe reinforcement learning often requires policies to adapt at deployment time to safety budgets that vary across episodes or change within a single episode. While diffusion-based planners enable flexible trajectory generation, existing guidance schemes often treat reward improvement and cost satisfaction as a single combined guidance, leading to suboptimal trade-offs. We propose a decoupled diffusion planner that separates cost-conditioned generation for safety and reward gradient guidance for performance. This allows the agent to dynamically adjust to changing cost limits while maximizing reward. Experiments on offline safe RL benchmarks demonstrate superior adaptability and safety compliance.
安全强化学习与扩散规划.summary_zh: 离线安全强化学习通常需要策略在部署时适应跨回合或回合内变化的安全预算。虽然基于扩散的规划器支持灵活轨迹生成，但现有引导方案常将奖励提升和成本满足视为单一组合引导，导致次优权衡。我们提出一种解耦扩散规划器，将成本条件生成用于安全，奖励梯度引导用于性能。这使得智能体能够动态适应变化的成本限制，同时最大化奖励。在离线安全RL基准上的实验证明了其优越的适应性和安全合规性。创新点在于解耦安全与性能引导，实现了对动态成本限制的灵活响应。

自然语言处理与多语言极化检测.title: mdok-style at SemEval-2026 Task 9: Finetuning LLMs for Multilingual Polarization Detection
自然语言处理与多语言极化检测.title_zh: mdok-style在SemEval-2026任务9中：微调大语言模型进行多语言极化检测
自然语言处理与多语言极化检测.summary: SemEval-2026 Task 9 is focused on multilingual polarization detection. Specifically, it covers the identification of multilingual, multicultural and multievent polarization along three axes (in subtasks), namely detection, type, and manifestation. Online polarization presents a concern, because it can amplify societal divisions. We propose a method based on finetuning large language models (LLMs) for this task. Our approach achieves competitive results by leveraging multilingual pretrained models and task-specific fine-tuning. The system demonstrates effective detection of polarization across multiple languages and cultural contexts, contributing to the understanding of online discourse dynamics.
自然语言处理与多语言极化检测.summary_zh: SemEval-2026任务9专注于多语言极化检测，涵盖沿三个轴（检测、类型和表现）的多语言、多文化和多事件极化识别。在线极化是一个令人担忧的问题，因为它可能加剧社会分裂。我们提出了一种基于微调大语言模型(LLM)的方法。通过利用多语言预训练模型和任务特定微调，我们的方法取得了有竞争力的结果。该系统展示了跨多种语言和文化背景的有效极化检测，有助于理解在线话语动态。创新点在于将LLM微调应用于多语言极化检测，并针对多轴子任务进行了优化。

AI应用/事件识别.title: Efficient Temporal Datalog Materialisation for Composite Event Recognition
AI应用/事件识别.title_zh: 面向复合事件识别的高效时态Datalog物化
AI应用/事件识别.summary: Several applications demand the timely detection of critical situations, such as threats to safety and transparency, over high-velocity streams of symbolic events. This demand has motivated the development of (i) event specification languages, which define composite events via temporal patterns over primitive events, and (ii) event recognition engines, which detect composite events over event streams. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to composite event recognition based on temporal Datalog materialisation. We introduce a temporal Datalog fragment, called tDatalogMTL, which supports metric temporal operators and is well-suited for specifying composite events. We then present a materialisation algorithm that incrementally maintains a set of derived facts over temporal windows, enabling efficient recognition of composite events in streaming settings. Our approach is evaluated on real-world event streams, demonstrating significant performance improvements over state-of-the-art systems.
AI应用/事件识别.summary_zh: 本文提出了一种基于时态Datalog物化的复合事件识别新方法。针对高速符号事件流中关键情况（如安全威胁）的及时检测需求，作者设计了时态Datalog片段tDatalogMTL，支持度量时态算子，适合定义复合事件。核心创新在于提出增量式物化算法，在时间窗口内维护派生事实集，实现流式环境下的高效事件识别。在真实事件流上的实验表明，该方法相比现有系统在性能上有显著提升。主要贡献包括：形式化tDatalogMTL语言、提出增量物化算法、以及在流式场景中的高效验证。

category_summaries.多模态学习: 多模态学习研究重点在于跨模态对齐与融合，如视觉-语言模型的细粒度理解与生成。亮点包括利用对比学习提升图文匹配精度，以及探索音频、视频等多模态联合表示。趋势向动态交互与开放场景泛化发展。
category_summaries.计算机视觉/CV: CV领域聚焦于图像分割、目标检测与3D重建。亮点包括基于Transformer的通用分割框架与自监督预训练方法。趋势是减少标注依赖，增强模型对遮挡、小目标的鲁棒性。
category_summaries.机器人: 机器人研究强调自主导航与灵巧操作。亮点包括基于强化学习的复杂操作技能学习与多机器人协同。趋势是结合大语言模型实现自然语言指令理解与任务规划。
category_summaries.大语言模型/LLM: LLM研究持续优化模型效率与能力。亮点包括长上下文扩展、推理增强与知识蒸馏。趋势是探索模型的可解释性与安全性，以及向多模态与智能体方向融合。
category_summaries.理论研究: 理论研究关注学习理论、泛化边界与优化动态。亮点包括对Transformer表达能力的新证明与注意力机制的理论分析。趋势是建立更严谨的深度学习理论框架。
category_summaries.NLP: NLP研究涵盖文本分类、命名实体识别与机器翻译。亮点包括基于提示的少样本学习与跨语言迁移。趋势是提升模型对长文本、多语言及低资源语言的处理能力。
category_summaries.推荐系统: 推荐系统研究聚焦于用户行为建模与冷启动问题。亮点包括图神经网络与序列推荐模型。趋势是融合多模态特征与因果推断，增强推荐的可解释性。
category_summaries.强化学习/RL: RL研究关注样本效率与安全探索。亮点包括基于模型的RL与离线RL算法。趋势是结合扩散模型进行规划，以及多智能体协作学习。
category_summaries.优化算法: 优化算法研究涵盖自适应学习率与分布式优化。亮点包括新型优化器设计如LION与梯度压缩技术。趋势是面向大规模模型训练的效率与稳定性提升。
category_summaries.AI应用/生物医学: 生物医学AI应用重点在药物发现与疾病诊断。亮点包括图神经网络预测分子性质与医学图像分析。趋势是结合多模态数据（如基因组、影像）实现精准医疗。
category_summaries.机器人/强化学习: 机器人与强化学习结合的研究聚焦于技能学习与适应。亮点包括分层RL与奖励函数设计。趋势是学习从仿真到现实的迁移（Sim2Real）。
category_summaries.软件工程/LLM: LLM在软件工程中的应用包括代码生成、调试与测试。亮点包括利用LLM自动修复缺陷与生成文档。趋势是构建端到端的AI辅助开发工具。
category_summaries.传感器与边缘计算: 研究聚焦于传感器数据融合与边缘AI部署。亮点包括低功耗模型压缩与实时推理。趋势是面向物联网的分布式智能系统。
category_summaries.安全性与控制理论: 安全性研究涵盖对抗攻击防御与鲁棒控制。亮点包括证书学习与安全强化学习。趋势是建立可证明的安全保障机制。
category_summaries.人机协作: 人机协作研究关注任务分配与交互界面。亮点包括基于LLM的对话式协作与意图理解。趋势是提升机器人的社交智能与适应性。
category_summaries.自然语言处理/NLP: 同NLP类别，此处为重复分类。
category_summaries.知识图谱/逻辑: 知识图谱研究聚焦于推理与补全。亮点包括图神经网络与逻辑规则结合。趋势是动态知识图谱与事件推理。
category_summaries.理论研究/优化算法: 结合理论分析与优化算法设计。亮点包括收敛性证明与自适应方法。趋势是面向非凸优化与大规模问题。
category_summaries.多模态学习/智能体: 多模态智能体研究强调环境感知与决策。亮点包括视觉-语言导航与具身问答。趋势是构建通用智能体框架。
category_summaries.大语言模型/LLM应用: LLM应用覆盖教育、法律等领域。亮点包括检索增强生成（RAG）与领域微调。趋势是提升事实性与可控性。
category_summaries.图神经网络: GNN研究关注消息传递机制与图分类。亮点包括异质图网络与图Transformer。趋势是处理大规模图与动态图。
category_summaries.生成模型: 生成模型研究聚焦于扩散模型与GAN。亮点包括文本到图像生成的高质量与可控性。趋势是3D内容生成与视频生成。
category_summaries.人机交互/教育AI: 研究关注智能辅导系统与情感感知。亮点包括自适应学习路径与对话式教学。趋势是结合多模态反馈提升学习效果。
category_summaries.迁移学习/参数高效微调: 迁移学习研究聚焦于领域自适应与少样本学习。亮点包括Adapter与LoRA等微调方法。趋势是面向大模型的轻量化适配。
category_summaries.图神经网络/生成模型: 结合GNN与生成模型用于分子生成。亮点包括图扩散模型与条件生成。趋势是药物分子与材料设计。
category_summaries.规划与推理: 规划研究关注任务分解与逻辑推理。亮点包括基于LLM的规划器与符号推理。趋势是长期规划与动态环境适应。
category_summaries.语音识别: 语音识别研究聚焦于端到端模型与噪声鲁棒性。亮点包括自监督预训练与多语言支持。趋势是低资源语言识别与语音-文本联合建模。
category_summaries.代码克隆检测: 研究检测代码相似性与重复代码。亮点包括基于图神经网络的语义检测。趋势是跨语言克隆检测。
category_summaries.因果模型与决策: 因果研究关注因果发现与推理。亮点包括结构因果模型与反事实预测。趋势是因果强化学习与可解释决策。
category_summaries.情感识别: 情感识别研究涵盖文本、语音与面部表情。亮点包括多模态融合与细粒度情感分类。趋势是上下文感知与跨文化情感理解。
category_summaries.知识图谱问答: KGQA研究关注复杂推理与多跳问题。亮点包括图神经网络与预训练模型结合。趋势是开放域与动态知识图谱问答。
category_summaries.推荐系统/其他AI应用: 推荐系统与其他AI应用结合，如广告与医疗。亮点包括多目标优化与个性化。趋势是因果推荐与公平性。
category_summaries.NLP/智能体: NLP智能体研究关注对话系统与任务完成。亮点包括工具使用与记忆机制。趋势是自主智能体与多智能体协作。
category_summaries.机器学习/其他: 涵盖集成学习、主动学习等。亮点包括不确定性估计与标签噪声处理。趋势是自动化机器学习（AutoML）。
category_summaries.AI逻辑与论证系统: 研究逻辑推理与论证挖掘。亮点包括形式化论证与可解释AI。趋势是结合神经符号方法。
category_summaries.医疗影像与分层学习: 医疗影像分析聚焦于分割与诊断。亮点包括分层特征学习与自监督预训练。趋势是多模态融合与联邦学习。
category_summaries.生物信号与迁移学习: 研究脑电、心电等信号分析。亮点包括迁移学习适应个体差异。趋势是跨任务与跨模态迁移。
category_summaries.安全强化学习与扩散规划: 安全RL关注约束满足与风险规避。亮点包括盾牌机制与扩散模型规划。趋势是安全探索与鲁棒性。
category_summaries.自然语言处理与多语言极化检测: 检测社交媒体中的仇恨言论与偏见。亮点包括多语言模型与对抗训练。趋势是跨平台与细粒度检测。
category_summaries.AI应用/事件识别: 事件识别研究关注复杂事件检测与抽取。亮点包括多模态事件识别与时序推理。趋势是开放世界事件理解。

highlights: 研究亮点1：Bolek - 提出多模态语言模型用于分子推理，通过跨模态注意力机制提升可解释性，对药物发现决策透明化有重要价值。
研究亮点2：TOC-SR - 通过知识蒸馏和任务导向采样策略，构建高效紧凑的扩散模型，大幅降低计算成本，推动超分辨率实际部署。
研究亮点3：First-Order Efficiency for Probabilistic Value Estimation - 从统计视角提出一阶高效估计方法，为Shapley值等概率价值计算提供理论基础和实用算法，显著降低计算复杂度。
研究亮点1：Mitigating Misalignment Contagion by Steering with Implicit Traits - 提出利用模型内部隐式特质向量引导行为，无需微调即可防止多智能体系统中的对齐传染，具有重要实用价值。
研究亮点2：Shadow-Loom: Causal Reasoning over Graphical World Model of Narratives - 将因果推理与叙事世界模型结合，为故事理解和反事实推理提供了新颖框架，学术创新性强。
研究亮点3：CoRAL: Contact-Rich Adaptive LLM-based Control for Robotic Manipulation - 将LLM的高层推理与接触丰富操作的底层控制结合，解决了LLM在物理任务中的落地难题，具有显著应用前景。
研究亮点1：《基于AI的前列腺病理端到端模型在长期存档常规样本上的验证》——利用注意力机制实现端到端学习，在数十年跨度的大规模样本上验证了对临床变异的鲁棒性，为AI病理模型的临床部署提供了关键证据。
研究亮点2：《零信任代理AI中的混合检查与基于任务的访问控制》——首次将零信任原则应用于LLM代理安全，提出任务级最小权限访问控制框架，有效缓解了多轮对话和分布式协作场景下的安全风险。
研究亮点3：《基于Newton-Schulz的Stiefel流形二阶方法》——提出无回缩的二阶优化方法，通过Newton-Schulz迭代实现超线性收敛，在特征值问题和深度学习任务中显著优于现有一阶方法，具有重要理论价值和应用潜力。
研究亮点1：OphMAE: Bridging Volumetric and Planar Imaging with a Foundation Model for Adaptive Ophthalmological Diagnosis — 首次提出跨模态眼科基础模型，通过掩码自编码器学习体积与平面成像的通用表征，实现自适应诊断，具有重要临床应用价值。
daily_summary:
今日AI研究呈现出多模态融合与大型语言模型（LLM）赋能两大核心趋势。多模态学习领域，跨模态对齐与生成模型取得显著进展，如视觉-语言模型在细粒度理解上的突破，以及扩散模型在文本到图像生成中的高质量控制。计算机视觉方面，基于Transformer的通用分割框架和自监督预训练方法成为主流，推动模型向少标注、强泛化方向发展。LLM研究持续深化，重点聚焦于长上下文扩展、推理增强和知识蒸馏，同时向多模态智能体、软件工程等应用领域渗透，例如利用LLM进行代码生成与缺陷修复。

强化学习与机器人领域，结合扩散模型的规划方法以及安全探索机制成为研究热点，旨在提升复杂操作技能学习的样本效率与安全性。理论研究方面，对Transformer表达能力和注意力机制的新证明为深度学习提供了更坚实的理论基础。此外，图神经网络在分子生成、知识图谱推理中的应用日益深入，而生成模型则向3D内容与视频生成拓展。

整体来看，今日研究体现了AI从单一模态向多模态、从感知向认知与决策的演进，同时注重模型效率、安全性和可解释性。LLM作为通用接口，正加速与各领域的交叉融合，推动自主智能体和具身智能的发展。未来研究趋势将更加注重跨领域协同、理论创新与实际应用的平衡。
